particulars.description: The freehold property known as: (a) land on the north east side of nash road, margate as the same is registered with title absolute under title number K862221 at the land registry; (b) 21 nash lane, margate, CT9 4EX as the same is registered with title absolute under title number TT65653 at the land registry; (c) land adjoining 21A nash lane, margate, CT9 4EX as the same is registered with title absolute under title number TT165029 at the land registry and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all fixtures and fittings from time to time situate on it.
